title: citropsis gabunensis var. lacourtiana
intro: Citropsis gabunensis var. lacourtiana, also known as the Lacourt's citron, is a variety of the Citropsis gabunensis plant, which belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to West Africa. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Citropsis gabunensis var. lacourtiana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to create herbal teas and tonics, which are used to treat various ailments.
